paper_title: The Great Escape? A Quantitative Evaluation of the Fed's Liquidity Facilities
authors: Del Negro, Marco; Eggertsson, Gauti; Ferrero, Andrea; Kiyotaki, Nobuhiro

model_index_row.primary_source_title: The Great Escape? A Quantitative Evaluation of the Fed's Liquidity Facilities

raw_pdf.path: raw/mmb_papers/The Great Escape? A Quantitative Evaluation of the Fed's Liquidity Facilities.pdf

notes: The model-index row reports matched MinerU source and a 1.0000 title-match score.
The paper body prints the household liquidity constraints, aggregate investment equation, convenience-yield definition, government rules, and aggregate identities.
The paper body delegates detailed final-good, intermediate-good, wage, and capital-producer equations to online Appendices B.1-B.3.
No appendix normalization exists for NK_DEFK17 in docs/mmb_appendix_full_normalizations.
The local .mod confirms the MMB variable list, timing implementation, steady-state values, and the single liquidity shock e_phi, but is not treated as a paper-side source.

runtime_validation.notes: Dynare was not run; this entry is a source-backed derivation draft only.
